sentences.arabic: زَارَتْ سَلْمَى جَدَّتَهَا فِي الْقَرْيَةِ فِي الصَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Selma je posjetila svoju baku u selu ljeti.
sentences.translationEn: Salma visited her grandmother in the village in summer.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْقَرْيَةُ هَادِئَةً وَالْهَوَاءُ نَقِيًّا وَبَارِدًا.
sentences.translation: Selo je bilo tiho a zrak čist i svjež.
sentences.translationEn: The village was quiet and the air was clean and cool.

sentences.arabic: مَشَتْ سَلْمَى مَعَ جَدَّتِهَا فِي الْحُقُولِ وَشَاهَدَتِ الطَّبِيعَةَ.
sentences.translation: Selma je šetala s bakom po poljima i promatrala prirodu.
sentences.translationEn: Salma walked with her grandmother through the fields and observed nature.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ سَلْمَى إِنَّهَا لَنْ تَنْسَى هَذِهِ الزِّيَارَةَ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Selma je rekla da nikada neće zaboraviti ovu posjetu.
sentences.translationEn: Salma said she would never forget this visit.
